name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: President Trump speaks in Wisconsin
body:
Today, President Trump becomes the first American president to visit the city of Marinette, Wisconsin. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=08d0d17449&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 25, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump speaks in Wisconsin**

[**WATCH LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: President Trump speaks from shipbuilding yard**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6090a6a55b&e=3ee4985eea)

**Today, President Trump** becomes the first American president to visit the city of Marinette, Wisconsin. Marinette was recently awarded a $5 billion Navy shipbuilding contract, which will result in up to 1,000 new manufacturing jobs for the area.

**“We will see years** of growth as a direct result,” Marinette Mayor Steve Genisot says.

**Under President Trump,** America is rebuilding our military, reviving our manufacturing sector, and reshoring our critical supply chains. Small communities across the American Heartland have come roaring back to life as a result.

**This “Buy American, Hire American”** philosophy is helping our economy recover quickly and strongly from the Coronavirus, too. Whereas the Great Recession and Obama nonrecovery hurt middle-class jobs and wages for years, the pro-growth Trump Economy is already shattering expectations once again.

**Last month** , economists predicted that America would lose 2.5 million jobs. Instead, our country added _7.5 million_ of them—the largest single-month gain in U.S. history.

[MORE: President Trump is putting American workers first in line for jobs!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=302cdb2f9f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Vice President Pence: Protecting faith, school choice, and jobs**

**Vice President Mike Pence** has been on the move this week, meeting with citizens across the country to discuss important issues such as school choice, religious freedom, and America’s economic recovery from the Coronavirus.

**Today,** he and Energy Secretary Dan Brouillette visited Lordstown Motors in Ohio for the unveiling of their new electric truck—yet another symbol of the manufacturing innovation that is pushing America’s automotive sector to new heights.

**“We put China on notice** that the era of economic surrender is over,” [Vice President Pence said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4605c3fa89&e=3ee4985eea). “We stood strong for American jobs and American workers against China.”

**On Tuesday,** the Vice President visited Wisconsin, where he joined a roundtable discussion on school choice.

**The Trump Administration** is working on a new program that will make more than $5 billion in Education Freedom Scholarships available to American families. This effort will empower more parents to choose the school that is right for their kids—whether that be public, private, charter, or religious school.

**School choice** also came up in a discussion the Vice President held with African-American faith and community leaders at the Tulsa Dream Center in Oklahoma this past weekend. During the meeting, he also addressed President Trump’s recent actions to improve safe policing following the tragic, unjust death of George Floyd.

**“As Americans** , we grieve together—and we heal together.”

[IN PHOTOS: Vice President Pence visits Tulsa Dream Center](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c151f87cc1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump participates in a town hall interview with Sean Hannity of Fox News at Green Bay-Austin Struble International Airport** | June 25, 2020
---
|

name: Team LaHood
subject: These pillars are showing cracks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
I’m talking about our universities, our police departments, and even Congress... [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=91e26e519c5446aa84ee5a0a073db7fd&_e=RP5H6aldDhFFrrrewzfRtC0ao0GZEk-RykFwD7YV1Snk2iCic3s-ZltAb2-sHjMdhZk49TM77_C1uBhpdGnbsbjgsqRl8rQ6cokOzsdwFrSgU3izsN7ZAArY2odwjCrjmgMgNKaINmuYbe7gozI_w6sqRzUVFP612n7OTp4UjGgzmV47ilqHcJJqg7skoGHQx3w81p0AGXE_QyW_DEV-TwhI6A6aC1S3s2HcjyUbGArSlzT6vLNx67UG_JDNXL9B1qIwxHSyO6mqYO33qMIAlt6Vwe6PBF9vSGl7J80S4rSZofun65Mx6tPm2DSxeJqmnx0TfqU3IcCywMAf7_8qzne21Vrn2BcjABA348udUn9AMqFtaukwyqoNdloY9pcdaEfRFV0IMqEh5xFnRqoT8G1AsZFV8383j_RB-M4ibbOFinKNnjcLCfV6Q-0VeAU1w76_wKxbrpn8fXeiPWIbpMpYbnbRZZKfFO_BP5MWdUo%3D) | |
---
Friend,

**America is in uncharted waters right now – and that calls for unprecedented action.**

Statues of American heroes – Theodore Roosevelt, Abraham Lincoln, and George Washington are being defaced and torn down every day – but that’s not all that’s being torn down.

Institutions and pillars of our American society which have stood for decades – even centuries – are under attack as I write this, and our nation needs **patriots** to step up and defend them.

_**I’m talking about our universities, our police departments, and even Congress.**_

Progressive Democrats want to defund our police departments, but they’re dead set on policing what we think about and speak about on our college campuses. This flies in the face of what our First Amendment stands for, and I’m not going to sit back and allow it to happen.

**Congress is the root of this problem – and we have a chance to change that in November!**

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Our commanding lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
We’re still waiting on absentee ballots to be counted, but thanks to our decisive margin during in-person voting, at least one independent outlet has called the race in our favor. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z0IZfSrbb6JB3qMyNklARgVvAdv-w6x0LEDTcbTF72MSVSPuLk1M10jy9Hvswca5xDZW_PWk8-KWghLFTrOm4IWEBghtkveIfYC0ux7j91AiCE77IMDmuV5KYjaQki_6e72WMvDYNs72Qxb6d7XvKZxvsHStkWylVJfIsHbUND39zwkV2JJkO9Zy6TWOlVwTJrZ_fxMPDmDxxZ0LQPLXpuhHW92patVQMYd0XeCn05JtPv_pbdin1joTtq_yfbW4mjmQydaJmZbHURt9JcZvV5/32x/qYF-Mv53QPO3d2mNpnaNmw/h0/9r59GC8ice0LLXG0jbEvE2IdAzD3TE63_cUNvHEpg2M)
Friend,
Wow.

We’re still waiting on absentee ballots to be counted, but thanks to our decisive margin during in-person voting, at least one independent outlet has called the race in our favor. Some of our competitors have publicly offered me their congratulations.
Friend, _**we are up by 24 percentage points, more than double the second-place finisher**_.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z0IZfSrbb6JB3qMyNklARg-BRi79qA7UYStpEP9exzuS518d29sr0bTM7h2xcj19UwFT9ervW3x-TFuLDkE2R5RWIcJCGQiUo5Q8D2JcDEfZuA59fdSgwj6_HbmFtUWDp9Qd_eSPCwQOXVHroGpzFW7DgMw7DOrmZnTnRt6kODMngaXr9d5HZx6RA0CfJVLAsmPaOrTmpcb2MxzWMrDrq2sQgZVk9hfzifIx71mOGxZbneBzir9BpezkwzgoyqbPPST3e6t4LTIjiiaJUDsz41/32x/qYF-Mv53QPO3d2mNpnaNmw/h1/v6k0nYhaxESN8Qr5zVxcFWt7i1JoB77LFHG8N2SXKX4)

I am so excited about what this means for the people of New York’s 17th Congressional District, the same community that raised me.
As I said in a speech to volunteers on Tuesday night, this campaign has never been about me. It has always been about an idea: the idea that we can finally deliver a government that works for everyone, not just the super rich and the well-connected.
That we can save the planet from climate catastrophe through a Green New Deal. That, in the richest nation in the history of the world, now suffering from a global pandemic, we can ensure that everyone--and I mean everyone--has health care. That, through tuition-free college and student debt forgiveness, we can liberate an entire generation of young people to meaningfully participate in our economy.
Sometimes, an idea is so powerful that once you go down its road, it becomes this unstoppable force. And before you know it, it becomes a _movement_ joined by people from all walks of life, regardless of race, income, gender, religion, or sexual orientation.
I want to thank you for the tireless work that you put into this campaign. The donations you gave, calls you made, and emails you sent. You organized this district, in the truest sense of the word, to fight for the better world that we know is possible. This victory will be as much yours as it will be mine.
I can’t wait.
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z0IZfSrbb6JB3qMyNklARgn9tLUhq1ssb9eGPtdI1wg0TsU1pKqZl3hSVAij8iWxwmJCRFT4dbCOEtIn1wGo8rkb5aXhSEsog20lgi7mQrX_NJ3YgMoiYLGk4-I6cFgUsdAM5mEDzoyPg0m_NQ6ar5ALu9Zt5dDzUuEEqb3E4uFVK5m_uhVqF1ISeLLkf-Y6c8R52WKOgKTcZA5BqFMaJYekyq8brZkWiKpZ9wa4xf_QXqpBlWNpWttZukbY5m_cHW54sydBSHgEkXcc6mSlgA/32x/qYF-Mv53QPO3d2mNpnaNmw/h2/NiOO_TPaWxtgcLr6LiUPgQ5st2D3ytgFheIl0-s-Ed4)
Sincerely,
Mondaire
[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiIehPqLp50aR83p0fofD_ekhRhBB1VQa7ebqL9x_w2EA943FmL3ISkEdgjfPosMKQVJEqgs6Ni76HXXixzu7j5KVDq2FdrugN0uvRpwfSgj9_a04U_Hbe6kS86Jmmwf37RBh8_yF8epK21stoNUt11f0oWy5-6mgAOFZ7moiZMXKngUguQm7Awd_IdQduRdeehvhXQZ4x-iQWvgJveHcy6cdXT1y0VhjUTTDCvVRLW4HQ/32x/qYF-Mv53QPO3d2mNpnaNmw/h3/aBfr-XLgYpO0FRKa2JOqqYojMGbI_fReSu1b41DahoM) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlVeQ7MpruVa0KNw2sbNX7FaHgAq4ezIjM3urw8wX5_wJBzg3R1I6d_NIIqALgRmKgRkZu6dzRxahB-oSnIJ1hpv6zrlNCd5pBBEObcRu0Ed76oxBfCQMJJlF_kWzCPGgnq-xWfoeyn-trvRdzF6WXY-JtGW9h0pC22rhfl_TOHWWrBStSR6MqJFuKvz_pjGevHdSqFUA3A1vUsBDIJM9CwLSKPxFnNvw2puv7Ok2MQ_/32x/qYF-Mv53QPO3d2mNpnaNmw/h4/h-AW6DtXDdmhG1i2dvMiYKkyKNdsaFLoQflxmsreQmc) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7SChrnF8iSfFHczcmiKgbnUiZTIuIxpNGkY3s5ZiTcVqHL_NxZnSk8RiRdn01xRk79SqpT3Sur-8HSSFShA6Cef-a67eUrQ3t-9nWnIh-vub2sIrT_CTRB6TWwc8hp7cXRuVBgSjmrW1z6IGhb2ASMQo5g0txkPJwFtH-xMPkheFM1IQ960poLJRxAII0vF5NdlCFB9IEiO7YAdIZf1TJIY56vKNdoDgJETF-igHh6uRw/32x/qYF-Mv53QPO3d2mNpnaNmw/h5/OlQF0_0B2DPumzgC8VuDG2FDrLgEEvk76WUh8P9qyU0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: We Need Good Judges
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/we-need-good-judges?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# The federal judiciary holds power over every American. One of President Trump’s defining accomplishments has been the appointment of 200 new federal judges, who believe that judges should not legislate from the bench. President Trump has appointed two outstanding Supreme Court justices. All of these judges will serve for many years.

As we have seen in recent weeks, we need federal judges who know that a judge is not supposed to legislate from the bench. We need federal judges who believe in the Constitution and know that the Constitution is not a flexible document. President Trump and the Republican-led U.S. Senate has been delivering those judges.

Democrats have been very clear that they want to remake the judiciary into some sort of super legislature. They have said they want to expand the Supreme Court because they want to seize control. Some have even suggested impeaching President Trump’s judicial because they were picked by President Trump or are too young. Talk about being petty and wanting to rig the game.

As a senator, I believe one of my most importance responsibilities will be voting on the confirmation of judges and also recommending judicial nominees from Kansas to the President. In fulfilling these duties, my plan is to find and confirm judges who do not think their job is to legislate from the bench and know the role of a judge in our country.

Dave

_P.S. - Please click on the logo below to donate to us so Kansas can elect a senator who will work with President Trump to put qualified judges on the bench. _ [](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=49f9bef929&e=41f8e27552)

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: setting the record straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
ADD YOUR NAME: Support mail-in voting
|
---

| | Derek --

The Trump administration is peddling some dangerous lies about mail-in voting.

**First, Attorney General Barr called voting by mail "opening the floodgates to fraud"** in an interview. He even went as far as to suggest that mail-in ballots might not be secret.

**Then, President Trump tweeted that "millions of mail-in ballots will be printed by foreign countries,"** saying that the 2020 election would be "rigged" and the "scandal of our times."

**_Let 's set the record straight._**

We're facing a global pandemic. People across the Commonwealth and across the country may feel torn between protecting their health and the health of their families and casting their ballot. **They shouldn 't have to choose.**

That's why Mark Warner is a proud co-sponsor of the _VoteSafe Act_ , which would require all states to allow residents to cast their ballots by mail in 2020 elections, expand in-person early voting options nationwide, and make improvements to the voter registration process.

**[Will you help Mark raise public awareness of the VoteSafe Act and become a citizen co-sponsor?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d40f/53d9897e/54a75fb1/1c88445a/65235928/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-mailin")**

Thousands of Virginians used mail-in voting to securely cast their ballots for Tuesday's primary elections and thousands more will have the opportunity to do so for the November general election. Expanding our voting options doesn't take away anyone's right to cast their ballot in person if they choose. It adds options for those who may not feel safe or may not be able to visit their polling place by expanding early in-person voting and making voting by mail more accessible.

Thanks to our General Assembly, Virginia already has expanded ballot access, and Mark believes that every voter should have the same opportunity to safely cast their ballot. We have to act quickly on this, so we can get this policy in place by Election Day.

**[Add your name now.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d40f/53d9897e/54a75fb1/1c88445a/65235928/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-mailin")**

**Bottom line:** The only reason you'd be against mail-in voting is if you wanted fewer people to vote.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d40f/53d9897e/54a75fb1/1c884459/65235928/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-mailin?refcode=20200625_p_2_fl__626__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d40f/53d9897e/54a75fb1/1c884458/65235928/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

Let 's set the record straight. We're facing a global pandemic. People across the Commonwealth and across the country may feel torn between protecting their health and the health of their families and casting their ballot. They shouldn 't have to choose. That's why Mark Warner is a proud co-sponsor of the VoteSafe Act , which would require all states to allow residents to cast their ballots by mail in 2020 elections, expand in-person early voting options nationwide, and make improvements to the voter registration process. "" Thousands of Virginians used mail-in voting to securely cast their ballots for Tuesday's primary elections and thousands more will have the opportunity to do so for the November general election. Expanding our voting options doesn't take away anyone's right to cast their ballot in person if they choose. It adds options for those who may not feel safe or may not be able to visit their polling place by expanding early in-person voting and making voting by mail more accessible. Thanks to our General Assembly, Virginia already has expanded ballot access, and Mark believes that every voter should have the same opportunity to safely cast their ballot. We have to act quickly on this, so we can get this policy in place by Election Day. "" Bottom line: The only reason you'd be against mail-in voting is if you wanted fewer people to vote. Thank you for your support. -- Team Warner | "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| | Hi Peter,

**Just finished our weekly budget call with the team, and we're running behind on this week's goal.**

There's no need for us to panic -- _yet_. We've seen this happen before, but **_every time_** , this grassroots team steps up and carries us through -- and that's what we're counting on right now.

**[We just need to bring in $2,614 before the weekend to hit our goal. Can we count on you to come through for the team?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890189/7f51f7bc/4146423b/4ef6cccd/2692728220/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NjgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200626.3nd__1568__&amount=10")**

With the primary runoff election just around the corner, our goals are critical. Texans only have 19 days until they have to decide who will be taking on Sen. Cornyn this November, and we need to take every opportunity we can get to reach out to undecided voters before July 14th.

You know as well as I do that MJ is the candidate who can flip Texas, but that starts with hitting this goal so we don't lose our momentum. **[HELP MJ BEAT SEN. name: Hailey Barringer
subject: NC is one of the most expensive 2020 battlegrounds →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
We can't afford to be drowned out by dark money.
|
---

| | Team -- North Carolina is expected to be one of the most expensive 2020 battlegrounds in the country:
1. Presidential campaigns are pouring**tens of millions of dollars** into our state.
2. The race for the Senate here has seen **the second highest spending in the country.**
3. The race for governor is expected to be**the most expensive in the country.**

The hard truth is, getting our message out there requires resources, and with big money pouring into North Carolina from every direction, we run the risk of getting drowned out if we don't hit our fundraising goals. [_**And we have a big FEC goal we need to reach before the end of the month. If you can, will you chip in before the deadline?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2cc/3d199a51/2f455515/7364d153/2700528565/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200626?refcode=kme200626_nd_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2cc/3d199a51/2f455515/7364d153/2700528565/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZCJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200626?refcode=kme200626_nd_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Francis Conole
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b58d/388db0e9/8ff6111/609bcf95/3179735159/VEsH/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conoleforcongress.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200625_TY_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200625_TY_U1_X1")

| | Friend, I'm reaching out to let you know that I just called Dana Balter to congratulate her on becoming our Democratic Nominee in NY-24. I wanted to take a minute to talk to you about this journey we went on together. With you by our side, we fought a valiant campaign -- one that brought light to issues that have been ignored by Republican John Katko for far too long. **I 'm proud of the campaign we ran and the work we did. **Together, we shone a light on inequity, disparities in healthcare, and the reality of what working families in our district are up against on a day-to-day basis. And while we came up short, I couldn't be more proud to support Dana Balter in her fight to unseat John Katko. The only way to flip this seat is if we all unite behind her with everything we have. **Our work here is not done -- it 's up to all of us to carry this through to November.** So thank you for your support along the way -- I hope you'll continue to support the fight to bring the changes we need to Central New York. Sincerely, Francis
---

clean_body: | "" | | Friend, I'm reaching out to let you know that I just called Dana Balter to congratulate her on becoming our Democratic Nominee in NY-24. I wanted to take a minute to talk to you about this journey we went on together. With you by our side, we fought a valiant campaign -- one that brought light to issues that have been ignored by Republican John Katko for far too long. I 'm proud of the campaign we ran and the work we did. Together, we shone a light on inequity, disparities in healthcare, and the reality of what working families in our district are up against on a day-to-day basis. And while we came up short, I couldn't be more proud to support Dana Balter in her fight to unseat John Katko. The only way to flip this seat is if we all unite behind her with everything we have. Our work here is not done -- it 's up to all of us to carry this through to November. So thank you for your support along the way -- I hope you'll continue to support the fight to bring the changes we need to Central New York. Sincerely, Francis | "" | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by Conole for Congress Conole for Congress PO Box: 851 Syracuse, NY 13201 mailto:info@conoleforcongress.com "" "" tel:+13152808751

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Making a statement with your mask
body:
Your COVID-19 news update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Every day, Rhode Island is making progress in the fight against COVID-19. But we can't allow ourselves to get complacent now. We need to stick with the methods that work: washing our hands thoroughly, keeping six feet of social distance, and most importantly, wearing our masks.
Most states that are seeing spikes in COVID-19 cases don't require mask wearing. On the other hand, 11 out of 15 states--including Rhode Island--with mask wearing mandates are are seeing cases decline.
Here are today's numbers in Rhode Island:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dcNEOFkmpdZ_fCySCC_TqbvFaTaXp24JXG8YGnVBfsQS1t_mPxxM2OlzO2XUkOTjRSk1ENOHbcbwGXZ_s1RUtpK4q2xMXD2tuZ3Xh03blJBgsSmKnzdR6EID1llZda3sgxDZVtXwEh8c_Rg_qYdT1mujepLnBsfCROPJImrLGmjkbIk7h16WzNA1nFyPRJ52NyEswk3giyQ=&c=zL4Yq6H-_7mTb9PZi5TtKXWrexI0GyfI8MoQg2wc4TlVxYDxkMPZ-w==&ch=w0295Syoc--vbdIyO6mv9id-SRR2f1wqOCMAQybc6MErOpDW6aoMRA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dcNEOFkmpdZ_fCySCC_TqbvFaTaXp24JXG8YGnVBfsQS1t_mPxxM2OlzO2XUkOTjRSk1ENOHbcbwGXZ_s1RUtpK4q2xMXD2tuZ3Xh03blJBgsSmKnzdR6EID1llZda3sgxDZVtXwEh8c_Rg_qYdT1mujepLnBsfCROPJImrLGmjkbIk7h16WzNA1nFyPRJ52NyEswk3giyQ=&c=zL4Yq6H-_7mTb9PZi5TtKXWrexI0GyfI8MoQg2wc4TlVxYDxkMPZ-w==&ch=w0295Syoc--vbdIyO6mv9id-SRR2f1wqOCMAQybc6MErOpDW6aoMRA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| I know that wearing a mask was hard to get used to - it was certainly jarring for me. But over the last few weeks, we've become innovators. Instead of backing down, tens of thousands of people across the state have turned mask wearing into an opportunity for self-expression. Check out this video to see some of the ways Rhode Islanders are making the most of the situation:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dcNEOFkmpdZ_fCySCC_TqbvFaTaXp24JXG8YGnVBfsQS1t_mPxxM2HKYqAOwRQcmf-NTTLY-hYLOIuZYpoJKmSDGKegRenFPXldlWtH2LBIq4qedQOQW9a95cANDri5SWaV_aZbReh_UNvcp-GbiO6VtPBVK-3bmkJznge2IazDxGPXzqaMkxvggPwZyi8l8Gi0iTYvv4gI=&c=zL4Yq6H-_7mTb9PZi5TtKXWrexI0GyfI8MoQg2wc4TlVxYDxkMPZ-w==&ch=w0295Syoc--vbdIyO6mv9id-SRR2f1wqOCMAQybc6MErOpDW6aoMRA==)
---
| The most important thing to remember throughout this crisis is that we all need to be kind to one another. If you see someone who isn't wearing a mask, you can offer to help them get one. We should also remember that folks with certain underlying conditions may not be able to wear a mask.
But if you can wear a mask, putting it on is a great way to help keep your community safe. My mask protects you; your mask protects me. I'm asking all Rhode Islanders to be good neighbors.
Thank you for staying strong as we continue to fight COVID-19 in Rhode Island. I'll back on TV at 1:00 p.m. tomorrow to give a live update.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dcNEOFkmpdZ_fCySCC_TqbvFaTaXp24JXG8YGnVBfsQS1t_mPxxM2HKYqAOwRQcme0S8fahYEsO3SaU5wxkF0rd4jcwHTP_KiLwj1Ws2V1Kjjd2a8soUcpeKssaXatylmIbeQ7VFuhQy5lzfC74z0bUi3Buzhuebg45FAYQIyr5UyHXoihnjYW3W8qnHsgBqkNgaAQYo6mSLUIXL1TRkk9OomT4K2m4bCYPzmXYvglf2T_lqeW2vVcn2Xrc6TPaF3VkNVnIeveN7EYft0bLlhJjO9wmZtQssgQAWFAoUG7u6JGs4uwFoAjgWPReVuewoCjoCSVireDk=&c=zL4Yq6H-_7mTb9PZi5TtKXWrexI0GyfI8MoQg2wc4TlVxYDxkMPZ-w==&ch=w0295Syoc--vbdIyO6mv9id-SRR2f1wqOCMAQybc6MErOpDW6aoMRA==).

name: Team Christy
subject: In case you need convincing...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

Garcia has been a disaster just his first six weeks in Congress. And we'll explain why. **[But if you don't need convincing, you can pitch in $5 or more here to help hit our end-of-quarter goal and send him packing.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba47/29776869/9d4ffbc/569ec77e/2770200112/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjVfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200625_eoq3-full")**
Here's the truth about Mike Garcia:

**He wants to take away reproductive rights.** One of his _very first acts_ as a member of Congress was to join in on far-right-wingers' attempts to force a vote on extreme anti-choice legislation. Then he co-sponsored a radical bill that would _ban abortion_ and some types of birth control.

**He doesn 't believe in sensible gun control measures.** The gun violence epidemic in our country is horrifying. We know there are ways to stop the senseless deaths. But Mike Garcia won't vote for commonsense reforms to protect kids at school, worshipers at prayer, or movie-goers in a theater.

**He 's ready to vote to end the Affordable Care Act.** He simply doesn't believe health care is a human right. But Christy has seen firsthand how hard it is when families can't afford care -- even though her mom worked as a nurse for years, she couldn't afford the insulin she needed to stay healthy. That's not a situation any American should have to face.

**The list goes on.**

If Democrats are going to continue working to protect Black lives and end police brutality, expand the ACA, pass gun reform, protect the right to choose, and so much more, we have to flip this key "toss-up" seat -- because the path to the majority runs through CA-25.

**[Your contribution ahead of Tuesday's all-important fundraising deadline could make or break this toss-up race. Chip in $5 or more right now to send Mike Garcia packing and elect a representative Californians can count on.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6ba47/29776869/9d4ffbc/569ec77e/2770200112/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA2MjVfZW9xMy1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2006_email_christy_eoq?refcode=em20_200625_eoq3-full")**
